source_chain.note: Time-domain accelerometer records from the centrifuge tests.

Canonical frequency table produced by the analysis1 pipeline. Note: T1 values in this CSV differ from the values embedded in fig14_effect_saturation.py; the script uses earlier-iteration reprocessed values per the manuscript note 'T1–T3 reprocessed using the same Welch method'. See also effect-saturation-measured.parquet for a parquet derived directly from this CSV.

This file. Transcribed verbatim from the numpy arrays at lines 47-55 of fig14_effect_saturation.py (mtime 2025-02-19 21:05). It is the 'path A' source for the J3 saturation migration — preserves exactly the numbers that the currently-published figure annotates.

notes: This parquet is a forensic snapshot, not a re-derivation. Any downstream figure built from it will reproduce the published fig14 numbers exactly.
For a CSV-derived counterpart, see effect-saturation-measured.parquet.
